summary:
Figitumumab lacks clinical trial support and regulatory approval for non-small cell lung cancer. There is no evidence showing its efficacy in treating NSCLC; current standards prioritize approved immunotherapies and targeted drugs.  

$\boxed{\text{B}}$ The provided information indicates that figitumumab does not have demonstrated efficacy in non-small cell lung cancer based on absent clinical trial results and official endorsements. Therefore, it should not be considered an effective option for NSCLC patients according to existing medical guidance.$\boxed{B}$
